# ============================================
# ROBOTS.TXT FOR SHAHABABBASI.COM
# Coding & Technical Content Website
# Optimized for: Search Engines + AI Overview + LLM Training
# ============================================

# ALLOW: Major Search Engines (Full Access)
# ----------------------------------
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Googlebot-Image
Allow: /

User-agent: Googlebot-Video
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

User-agent: DuckDuckBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Yandex
Allow: /


# ALLOW: AI & LLM Crawlers (Critical for AI Overview Ranking)
# ----------------------------------
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /

User-agent: OAI-SearchBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Allow: /

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Perplexity-User
Allow: /

User-agent: Applebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Applebot-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: CCBot
Allow: /

User-agent: FacebookBot
Allow: /

User-agent: meta-externalagent
Allow: /

User-agent: Amazonbot
Allow: /

User-agent: YouBot
Allow: /

User-agent: cohere-ai
Allow: /

User-agent: Diffbot
Allow: /

User-agent: Exabot
Allow: /

User-agent: ImagesiftBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Magpie-crawler
Allow: /

User-agent: Omgilibot
Allow: /

User-agent: Omgili
Allow: /

User-agent: PanguBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Timpibot
Allow: /

User-agent: VelenPublicWebCrawler
Allow: /

User-agent: Webzio-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: YouBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ia_archiver
Allow: /


# ============================================
# URL PARAMETERS & DYNAMIC CONTENT
# Block tracking, session, and filter parameters
# ============================================

# Block tracking and session parameters
Disallow: /*utm_
Disallow: /*ref=
Disallow: /*session=
Disallow: /*fbclid=
Disallow: /*gclid=
Disallow: /*utm_source=
Disallow: /*utm_medium=
Disallow: /*utm_campaign=
Disallow: /*utm_term=
Disallow: /*utm_content=
Disallow: /*utm_id=
Disallow: /*utm_source_platform=
Disallow: /*utm_creative_format=
Disallow: /*utm_marketing_tactic=
Disallow: /*mc_cid=
Disallow: /*mc_eid=
Disallow: /*pk_campaign=
Disallow: /*pk_kwd=
Disallow: /*pk_keyword=
Disallow: /*pk_source=
Disallow: /*pk_medium=
Disallow: /*pk_content=
Disallow: /*pk_cid=
Disallow: /*piwik_campaign=
Disallow: /*piwik_kwd=
Disallow: /*mtm_source=
Disallow: /*mtm_medium=
Disallow: /*mtm_campaign=
Disallow: /*mtm_keyword=
Disallow: /*mtm_content=
Disallow: /*mtm_cid=
Disallow: /*mtm_group=
Disallow: /*mtm_placement=
Disallow: /*yclid=
Disallow: /*_openstat=
Disallow: /*wickedid=
Disallow: /*gb_source=
Disallow: /*gb_medium=
Disallow: /*gb_campaign=
Disallow: /*gb_keyword=
Disallow: /*gb_content=
Disallow: /*msclkid=
Disallow: /*ttclid=
Disallow: /*twclid=
Disallow: /*li_fat_id=
Disallow: /*igshid=
Disallow: /*si=

# Block search and filter parameters
Disallow: /search/
Disallow: /*?s=
Disallow: /*?search=
Disallow: /*?q=
Disallow: /*filter=
Disallow: /*sort=
Disallow: /*orderby=
Disallow: /*order=
Disallow: /*dir=
Disallow: /*page=
Disallow: /*p=
Disallow: /*offset=
Disallow: /*limit=
Disallow: /*per_page=
Disallow: /*view=
Disallow: /*mode=
Disallow: /*layout=
Disallow: /*format=
Disallow: /*type=
Disallow: /*category=
Disallow: /*cat=
Disallow: /*tag=
Disallow: /*author=
Disallow: /*year=
Disallow: /*month=
Disallow: /*day=
Disallow: /*date=
Disallow: /*from=
Disallow: /*to=
Disallow: /*min=
Disallow: /*max=
Disallow: /*price=
Disallow: /*rating=

# Block admin, auth, and sensitive areas
Disallow: /wp-admin/
Disallow: /wp-login.php
Disallow: /wp-content/uploads/
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /administrator/
Disallow: /login/
Disallow: /logout/
Disallow: /register/
Disallow: /signup/
Disallow: /reset-password/
Disallow: /forgot-password/
Disallow: /account/
Disallow: /user/
Disallow: /profile/
Disallow: /dashboard/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /graphql/
Disallow: /wp-json/
Disallow: /xmlrpc.php
Disallow: /feed/
Disallow: /comments/feed/
Disallow: /trackback/
Disallow: /cgi-bin/

# Block utility and temp files
Disallow: /tmp/
Disallow: /temp/
Disallow: /cache/
Disallow: /logs/
Disallow: /backup/
Disallow: /backups/
Disallow: /old/
Disallow: /test/
Disallow: /testing/
Disallow: /dev/
Disallow: /development/
Disallow: /staging/
Disallow: /*.sql$
Disallow: /*.log$
Disallow: /*.zip$
Disallow: /*.tar.gz$
Disallow: /*.bak$
Disallow: /*.swp$
Disallow: /*.env$
Disallow: /*.config$
Disallow: /*.ini$
Disallow: /*.json?*
Disallow: /*?rest_route=
Disallow: /*?replytocom=

# ============================================
# CRAWL RATE LIMITING
# ============================================
Crawl-delay: 1

# ============================================
# SITEMAP & AI DISCOVERY FILES
# Critical for AI Overview and LLM discovery
# ============================================
Sitemap: https://shahababbasi.com/sitemap.xml

# https://shahababbasi.com/llms.txt
